'''jarobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iyashikei|iyashikei]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iyashikei|iyashikei]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jarobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jærebeth|jærebeth]] || [[word:jærebej|jærebej]] || [[word:jærebesh|jærebesh]] || [[word:jærebe|jærebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaroroboth|jaroroboth]] || [[word:jaroroboj|jaroroboj]] || [[word:jarorobosh|jarorobosh]] || [[word:jarorobo|jarorobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaroboth|jaroboth]] || [[word:jaroboj|jaroboj]] || [[word:jarobosh|jarobosh]] || [[word:jarobo|jarobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jarofboth|jarofboth]] || [[word:jarofboj|jarofboj]] || [[word:jarofbosh|jarofbosh]] || [[word:jarofbof|jarofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jarobotho|jarobotho]] || [[word:jarobojo|jarobojo]] || [[word:jarobosho|jarobosho]] || [[word:jaroboko|jaroboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaroboth|jaroboth]] || [[word:jaroboj|jaroboj]] || [[word:jarobosh|jarobosh]] || [[word:jarobo|jarobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jarobothol|jarobothol]] || [[word:jarobojol|jarobojol]] || [[word:jaroboshol|jaroboshol]] || [[word:jarobokol|jarobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jarobothotho|jarobothotho]] || [[word:jarobojojo|jarobojojo]] || [[word:jaroboshosho|jaroboshosho]] || [[word:jaroboko|jaroboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jarobothon|jarobothon]] || [[word:jarobojon|jarobojon]] || [[word:jaroboshon|jaroboshon]] || [[word:jarobokon|jarobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jarobothoro|jarobothoro]] || [[word:jarobojoro|jarobojoro]] || [[word:jaroboshoro|jaroboshoro]] || [[word:jarobokoro|jarobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
